title: Smart Decentralized Solar Energy Management
teaser: ESP32-based decentralized energy nodes maximizing solar capture via automated tracking.
problem: Centralized solar grids suffer from massive transmission losses and lack localized optimization. When a single central inverter fails, entire residential blocks lose power generation capability.
solution: We designed an ESP32-based decentralized node system capable of independently tracking solar vectors and directly routing power to localized batteries, reducing transmission loss by 18%.

milestones.title: Dual-Axis Actuation
milestones.desc: Built and tested the stepper motor assembly for the solar cradle.

milestones.title: Node Connectivity
milestones.desc: Programmed the ESP32 to publish localized telemetry to an MQTT broker.

milestones.title: Grid Integration Simulator
milestones.desc: Connecting multiple nodes together to simulate dynamic power diversion.

title: Drone-Based AQI Monitoring
teaser: Geo-tagged 3D environmental mapping using customized hexacopters.
problem: Standard AQI stations are static and remain at ground level, severely limiting analysis of vertical pollution distribution and failing to track transient smog clouds.
solution: A custom hexacopter carrying particulate and gas payload sensors that flies automated 3D grid patterns to generate volumetric models of local air pollution.

milestones.title: Hexacopter Assembly
milestones.desc: Calibrated the flight controller and balanced the drone frame.

milestones.title: Sensor Suite Integration
milestones.desc: I2C based multiplexing for 5 unique gas and particulate sensors.

milestones.title: Automated Survey Flights
milestones.desc: Autonomous way-point surveying over industrial boundaries.

milestones.title: 3D Topographic Modeling
milestones.desc: Translating telemetry logs into a live dashboard mesh.

title: Audio Guidance for Visually Impaired
teaser: Smart Glasses featuring YOLO spatial detection and <200ms low-latency audio feedback.
problem: Traditional walking canes only detect objects immediately on the ground constraint to arm's length, failing to warn users of overhead obstacles or distant approaching hazards.
solution: A wearable 'Smart Glasses' frame computing depth and object recognition live, conveying spatial coordinates directly as spatial audio pings to the user via bone-conduction.

milestones.title: Machine Learning Pipeline
milestones.desc: Compressed YOLOv8 execution to hit 30FPS on edge computing.

milestones.title: Hardware Miniaturization
milestones.desc: Designed a custom PCB allowing the rig to fit within a standard sunglass arm.

milestones.title: Clinical Trials
milestones.desc: Partnering with local NGOs for real-world usability testing.

title: Sign Language to Vocalizer
teaser: Wearable flex-sensor glove paired with a gesture-to-speech ML model.
problem: Communication barriers exist between sign language users and non-signers in dynamic public spaces requiring immediate interactions (e.g. at a grocery store checkout).
solution: A lightweight glove tracking finger bend mapping to a neural network that translates gestures into real-time synthesized speech via a paired mobile application.

techSpecs.sensors: Spectra Symbol Flex Sensors, MPU6050 IMU

milestones.title: IMU + Flex Calibration
milestones.desc: Reliable data streaming of raw finger curl and wrist pitch coordinates.

milestones.title: Model Training
milestones.desc: Gathering gesture datasets for 50 common ASL words.

milestones.title: Mobile App V1
milestones.desc: Deploying the vocalizer text-to-speech companion app.

title: IoT Water Monitoring & Segregation
teaser: Real-time pH/TDS sensing driving heavy-duty automated solenoid valves.
problem: Campus wastewater and rainwater are often improperly mixed, leading to chemical contamination of natural runoff systems.
solution: An automated pipeline junction featuring embedded probes calculating contamination vectors, actively diverting clean water to groundskeeping and contaminated water to filtration.

techSpecs.sensors: Industrial pH Probe, TDS Meter, Flow Sensor

milestones.title: Valve Automation
milestones.desc: Successfully driving 12V high-pressure solenoid valves via solid-state relays.

milestones.title: Sensor Calibration
milestones.desc: Calibrating analog pH readings against chemical buffer solutions.

milestones.title: Dashboard Telemetry
milestones.desc: Building a Node-RED interface for campus maintenance crews.
